message:
feat(engine): add 216 enrichment integration tests across 5 more modules

Eighteenth batch of enrichment tests:

- security_epoch: 39 tests (epoch serde/ordering, tracker state
  machine, transition chains, u64::MAX boundary, artifact validation)
- semantic_cover_schema: 51 tests (engine surfaces, cover features,
  overlap restrictions, gap severity, evidence corpus, specimens)
- seqlock_candidate_inventory: 41 tests (candidate dispositions,
  surface areas, manifest artifacts, default inventory, rendering)
- seqlock_fastpath: 43 tests (publish/read cycles, uninitialized
  fallback, seeding, telemetry invariants, concurrent access)
- seqlock_reader_writer_contract: 42 tests (contract candidates,
  retry budgets, fallback matrices, telemetry, artifact context)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
